messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 does not fully match the requirements of policy STD-RAV-072-P because payment release approval remains open. The ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 is still visible.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 states 'payment release approval remains open'.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action cannot proceed because the closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 does not satisfy the exact match requirement of policy STD-RAV-072-P, specifically regarding the completion of payment release approval. The visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 further indicates an incomplete process.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The action boundary is not closed as payment release approval is explicitly stated as open in CLOSE-RAV-072, and the ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 is visible. No authority exists to override these conditions.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source boundary match requirement from STD-RAV-072-P
Visible ERP hold status from HOLD-RAV-072
Payment release approval status from CLOSE-RAV-072
Invoice, vendor, and amount alignment across INV-RAV-072 and CLOSE-RAV-072
Tax review and quality signoff completion from CLOSE-RAV-072
latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. The action may not proceed. The closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states that payment release approval remains open, which violates the exact match requirement of policy STD-RAV-072-P. The visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 further confirms that the action boundary is not closed. All conditions for release, including completed payment release approval, must be met before the invoice can be released.
open_blockers: Payment release approval remains open per CLOSE-RAV-072, preventing closure of the action boundary.
Visible ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 indicates an incomplete process.

action.description: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?

context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-RAV-072 bills Ravel Packaging USD 51600 for packaging line retrofit.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue.
Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 covers INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, completed tax review, completed quality signoff; payment release approval remains open.

policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when a closeout ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

blocked_moves_so_far: AP release of invoice while payment release approval remains open
treating partial closeout ledger match as sufficient for release
ignoring visible ERP hold despite closeout ledger presence
overriding policy STD-RAV-072-P exact match requirement
